% I3 CORRECTED: E8 precision=1.000 with FP=0/600 benign events.
% Bootstrap CI [1.000,1.000] is degenerate (all 20 trials: FP=0, precision=1.000).
% The correct uncertainty statement is a Clopper-Pearson one-sided 95% UB on FP rate:
%   UB = 1-(0.05)^(1/600) = 0.50% (identical to rule-of-three 3/600 at 3 decimal places).
% The CI macros below are replaced with N/A; the UB is cited in-text via \RuleOfThreeSixHundred.
\newcommand{\EEightstochasticPrecisionMean}{1.000}  % E8_stochastic precision mean (FP=0/600 benign events, all 20 trials)
\newcommand{\EEightstochasticPrecisionCIlo}{\ensuremath{\text{N/A}}}  % degenerate bootstrap CI suppressed; see CP UB in text
\newcommand{\EEightstochasticPrecisionCIhi}{\ensuremath{\text{N/A}}}  % degenerate bootstrap CI suppressed; see CP UB in text

\newcommand{\EEightstochasticRecallCIlo}{0.986}  % 95% CI lower
\newcommand{\EEightstochasticRecallCIhi}{0.998}  % 95% CI upper
\newcommand{\EEightstochasticFOneMean}{0.996}  % E8_stochastic f1 mean
\newcommand{\EEightstochasticFOneCIlo}{0.993}  % 95% CI lower
\newcommand{\EEightstochasticFOneCIhi}{0.999}  % 95% CI upper
\newcommand{\EEightstochasticAccuracyMean}{0.995}  % E8_stochastic accuracy mean
\newcommand{\EEightstochasticAccuracyCIlo}{0.991}  % 95% CI lower
\newcommand{\EEightstochasticAccuracyCIhi}{0.999}  % 95% CI upper
\newcommand{\EEightstochasticNTrials}{20}  % n trials
\newcommand{\EEightstochasticEventTotal}{1800}  % total decisions across all trials
